title: Mould King City Aircraft Engine Building Kit, Turbojet Engine Model That Runs, Mini Engine Build Kit for Adults with Battery, Mechanical Science Education STEM Toy(2256 PCS)
features: 【Aircraft Engine Scale Model】This model building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks, based on the prototype of aircraft engine, as a total of 2256+ pieces bricks.
【REALISTIC MODEL THAT WORKS】 Mould King Aircraft Engine set contains many realistic details.

【Follow the steps】The toy set contains many building blocks, all components are sorted and carefully packaged so that they are not lost. Installation instructions are included so you can start with each step. Compatible with most similar building blocks on the market, with strong scalability.

【Premium Quality Material】Mould King 10141 Engine Kits made from ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

【STEM Engine Toy】Mould King building sets are the best for people to recreate scenes from the dream up their own original stories. And it is a good collection. For any occasion such as New Years Day, Christmas, Birthday, Easter, Halloween, Chanukkah, STEM
